recordLookups.name: Get_Loan_Record_Present_Or_Not
recordLookups.label: Get Loan Record Present Or Not

textTemplates.name: emailBodyForCustomer
textTemplates.text:
Dear Customer, Welcome to Runwal family!

Your booking has been registered on the system and is currently under validation stage. Request you to complete all other formalities to help us  finalizing  your booking.

textTemplates.name: emailBodyForSMAndTL
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

This is an automated notification to inform you that the Greeting Call for {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name} has been successfully completed.

Call Details:

  • Customer: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}
  • Date: {!$Record.Greeting_Call_Accepted_date__c}
  • Outcome: Accepted

Please review the details at your earliest convenience to determine the next steps in the pipeline.

View Record: https://runwal--fullcopy.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/{!$Record.Opportunity__c}/view

textTemplates.name: emailBodyReinitiated
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

The Greeting Call for {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name} has been Reinitiated by the Sales Manager.

The previous concerns have been addressed, and the record is now open for a fresh verification call. Please find the details below to proceed:

  • Opportunity Name: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}
  • Project & Unit: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.RW_Project_Unit__r.Name}

Next Steps for RM:

  1. Navigate to the Opportunity record.
  2. Click the Greeting Call button.
  3. Verify the "No" fields with the customer via Click to Call.

Update the status to Accept, Hold, or Reject and Save.


https://runwal--fullcopy.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/{!$Record.Opportunity__c}/view

textTemplates.name: emailBodyTemplates
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

A new unit has been marked as Blocked. A Greeting Call task has been assigned to you.

Customer Details:

  • Customer Name: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}
  • Project: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.RW_Project__r.Name}
  • Unit Number: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.RW_Project_Unit__r.Name}

Process Requirement:

  1. You are required to initiate a call via the Salesforce Dialer.
  2. TAT: This call must be completed by [Date/Time + 48 Hours].

Please click the link below to access the record and initiate the call:

https://runwal--fullcopy.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/{!$Record.Opportunity__c}/view

Happy Calling!

textTemplates.name: emailTemplateForTAT
textTemplates.text:
Hi,

This is an automated alert to notify you that the Greeting Call for {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name} has exceeded the required Turnaround Time (TAT).

Please ensure the call is completed and logged in the system as soon as possible to maintain our service standards and client momentum.

https://runwal--fullcopy.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/{!$Record.Opportunity__c}/view

textTemplates.name: notificationBodyForReinitiated
textTemplates.text: The SM has closed the pending task for {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}. The Greeting Call status is now Reinitiated. Please complete the verification call and update the disposition

textTemplates.name: notificationBodyForSMAndTL
textTemplates.text: RM has finished the greeting call for {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}. Action: Review the call notes and assign the next task.

textTemplates.name: notificationBodyForTAT
subjectEmailTemplates
textTemplates.text: ACTION REQUIRED: New Greeting Call Assigned - {!$Record.Opportunity__r.RW_Project_Unit__r.Name} - {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name}

textTemplates.name: subjectForRejectAndHoldTasks
textTemplates.text: RM Mark The Greeting Call For Opportunity {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name} As {!$Record.Status__c}

textTemplates.name: templateBodyForRMNotification
textTemplates.text: Unit: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.RW_Project_Unit__r.Name} | Customer: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Name} Please initiate the call within 48 hours.
